SELECT value, toInt64(value) FROM test_int64 WHERE toInt64(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT mixed_value, toInt64(mixed_value) FROM test_mixed WHERE mixed_value NOT LIKE 'not_a_number' AND mixed_value NOT LIKE 'NaN' AND mixed_value NOT LIKE 'Inf' AND mixed_value NOT LIKE '0x%';
WITH (SELECT toInt64(count(*)) FROM test_int64) AS total_count SELECT total_count;
SELECT a.value, b.val, toInt64(a.value) + toInt64(b.val) FROM test_int64 AS a JOIN test_floats AS b ON toInt64(a.value) > 0;
SELECT toInt64(-9223372036854775809) AS overflow, toInt64(9223372036854775809) AS underflow;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (x Float64, y String);
SELECT x, y, toInt64(x) + toInt64(y) FROM complex_test;
